| `items`                     | `ReadonlyArray<Item>`                                                                                                                 | Set the multiselect items.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | `[]`                                |
| `itemToString`              | `(item: Item) => string \| Item["id"]`                                                                                                | Override the display of a multiselect item.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | _undefined_                         |
| `itemToInput`               | `(item: Item) => { name?: string; labelText?: any; title?: string; value?: string }`                                                  | Override the item name, title, labelText, or value passed to the user-selectable checkbox input as well as the hidden inputs.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | _undefined_                         |
| `size`                      | `"sm" \| "lg" \| "xl"`                                                                                                                | Set the size of the multiselect.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | _undefined_                         |
| `type`                      | `"default" \| "inline"`                                                                                                               | Specify the type of multiselect.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | `"default"`                         |
| `direction`                 | `"bottom" \| "top"`                                                                                                                   | Specify the direction of the multiselect dropdown menu.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | `"bottom"`                          |
| `selectionFeedback`         | `"top" \| "fixed" \| "top-after-reopen"`                                                                                              | Specify the selection feedback after selecting items.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | `"top-after-reopen"`                |
| `disabled`                  | `boolean`                                                                                                                             | Set to `true` to disable the dropdown                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | `false`                             |
| `filterable`                | `boolean`                                                                                                                             | Set to `true` to filter items                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | `false`                             |
| `filterItem`                | `(item: Item, value: string) => boolean`                                                                                              | Override the filtering logic.<br />The default filtering is an exact string comparison.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | _undefined_                         |
| `light`                     | `boolean`                                                                                                                             | Set to `true` to enable the light variant                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | `false`                             |
| `locale`                    | `string`                                                                                                                              | Specify the locale                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | `"en"`                              |
| `placeholder`               | `string`                                                                                                                              | Specify the placeholder text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `""`                                |
| `sortItem`                  | `((a: Item, b: Item) => number) \| (() => void)`                                                                                      | Override the sorting logic.<br />The default sorting compare the item text value.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | _undefined_                         |
| `translateWithId`           | `(id: import("../ListBox/ListBoxMenuIcon.svelte").ListBoxMenuIconTranslationId) => string`                                            | Override the chevron icon label based on the open state.<br />Defaults to "Open menu" when closed and "Close menu" when open.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | _undefined_                         |
| `translateWithIdSelection`  | `(id: import("../ListBox/ListBoxSelection.svelte").ListBoxSelectionTranslationId) => string`                                          | Override the label of the clear button when the input has a selection.<br />Defaults to "Clear selected item" and "Clear all items" if more than one item is selected.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | _undefined_                         |
| `labelText`                 | `string`                                                                                                                              | Specify the label text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | `""`                                |
| `useTitleInItem`            | `boolean`                                                                                                                             | Set to `true` to pass the item to `itemToString` in the checkbox                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | `false`                             |
| `invalid`                   | `boolean`                                                                                                                             | Set to `true` to indicate an invalid state                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | `false`                             |
| `invalidText`               | `string`                                                                                                                              | Specify the invalid state text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | `""`                                |
| `warn`                      | `boolean`                                                                                                                             | Set to `true` to indicate a warning state                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | `false`                             |
| `warnText`                  | `string`                                                                                                                              | Specify the warning state text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | `""`                                |
| `helperText`                | `string`                                                                                                                              | Specify the helper text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | `""`                                |
| `label`                     | `string`                                                                                                                              | Specify the list box label                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | `""`                                |
| `hideLabel`                 | `boolean`                                                                                                                             | Set to `true` to visually hide the label text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | `false`                             |
| `id`                        | `string`                                                                                                                              | Set an id for the list box component                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | `ccs-${Math.random().toString(36)}` |
| `name`                      | `string`                                                                                                                              | Specify a name attribute for the select.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | _undefined_                         |
| `virtualize`                | `undefined \| boolean \| { itemHeight?: number, containerHeight?: number, overscan?: number, threshold?: number, maxItems?: number }` | Enable virtualization for large lists. Virtualization renders only the items currently visible in the viewport, improving performance for large lists.<br /><br />By default, virtualization is automatically enabled for lists with more than 100 items.<br /><br />Set `virtualize={false}` to explicitly disable virtualization, even for large lists.<br /><br />Set `virtualize={true}` to explicitly enable virtualization with default settings.<br /><br />Provide an object to customize virtualization behavior:<br />- `itemHeight` (default: 40): The height in pixels of each item. Specify a custom value when using custom slots with multi-line items or different heights.<br />- `containerHeight` (default: 300): The maximum height in pixels of the dropdown container.<br />- `overscan` (default: 3): The number of extra items to render above and below the viewport for smoother scrolling. Higher values may cause more flickering during very fast scrolling.<br />- `threshold` (default: 100): The minimum number of items required before virtualization activates. Lists with fewer items will render all items normally without virtualization.<br />- `maxItems` (default: undefined): The maximum number of items to render. When undefined, all visible items are rendered. | _undefined_                         |
| `portalMenu`                | `boolean \| undefined`                                                                                                                | Set to `true` to render the dropdown menu in a portal,<br />allowing it to escape containers with `overflow: hidden`.<br />When inside a Modal, defaults to `true` unless explicitly set to `false`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | _undefined_                         |

#### `MultiSelect` typedefs

```ts
type MultiSelectItemText = string;

type MultiSelectItem<Id = any> = {
  id: Id;
  text: MultiSelectItemText;
  /** Whether the item is disabled */
  disabled?: boolean;
  /** Whether this item acts as a "select all" toggle */
  isSelectAll?: boolean;
};
```

#### `MultiSelect` slots

| Slot            | Detail                                              |
| --------------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| `default`       | `{<br />  item: Item;<br />  index: number;<br />}` |
| `labelChildren` | `Record<string, never>`                             |

#### `MultiSelect` forwarded events

| Event        |
| ------------ |
| `on:clear`   |
| `on:focus`   |
| `on:input`   |
| `on:keydown` |
| `on:keyup`   |
| `on:paste`   |
| `on:scroll`  |

#### `MultiSelect` dispatched events

| Event       | Detail                                                                                           |
| ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `on:blur`   | `type EventDetail =<br />  \| FocusEvent<br />  \| CustomEvent<FocusEvent>`                      |
| `on:select` | `{<br />  selectedIds: Item["id"][];<br />  selected: Item[];<br />  unselected: Item[];<br />}` |

#### `MultiSelect` $$restProps

`MultiSelect` spreads `$$restProps` to the `input` element.


## NotificationQueue

Notification queues provide an imperative API for managing toast notifications.
They handle positioning, deduplication, and overflow management, making it easy
to display notifications from anywhere in your application.

The queue uses the underlying [ToastNotification](ToastNotification) to display
notifications.

### Basic usage

Use `bind:this` to get a reference to the queue instance, then call `add()` to
show notifications. The queue automatically manages positioning and removes
notifications when they timeout or are closed.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ButtonSet,
    NotificationQueue,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let queue;
</script>

<NotificationQueue bind:this={queue} />

<ButtonSet>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      queue.add({
        kind: "success",
        title: "Success",
        subtitle: "Your changes have been saved.",
        timeout: 3000,
      });
    }}
  >
    Show success
  </Button>
  <Button
    kind="tertiary"
    on:click={() => {
      queue.add({
        kind: "error",
        title: "Error",
        subtitle: "An error occurred while processing your request.",
        timeout: 3000,
      });
    }}
  >
    Show error
  </Button>
  <Button
    kind="tertiary"
    on:click={() => {
      queue.add({
        kind: "info",
        title: "Information",
        subtitle: "New updates are available.",
        timeout: 3000,
      });
    }}
  >
    Show info
  </Button>
  <Button
    kind="tertiary"
    on:click={() => {
      queue.add({
        kind: "warning",
        title: "Warning",
        subtitle: "This is a warning notification.",
        timeout: 3000,
      });
    }}
  >
    Show warning
  </Button>
</ButtonSet>
```

### Positioning

Configure the queue position using the position prop. Notifications can appear
at the top-right (default) or bottom-right of the screen.

The `top-right` position assumes usage of the [UIShell](/components/UIShell)
component. Customize the position using [offset props](#custom-offsets).

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ButtonSet,
    NotificationQueue,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let topQueue;
  let bottomQueue;
</script>

<NotificationQueue bind:this={topQueue} position="top-right" />
<NotificationQueue bind:this={bottomQueue} position="bottom-right" />

<ButtonSet>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      topQueue.add({
        kind: "success",
        title: "Top right",
      });
    }}
  >
    Add top right
  </Button>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      bottomQueue.add({
        kind: "info",
        title: "Bottom right",
      });
    }}
  >
    Add bottom right
  </Button>
</ButtonSet>
```

### Deduplication

By default, the `id` prop is optional; a unique id will be generated for the
notification. The queue
[keys](https://svelte.dev/docs/svelte/each#Keyed-each-blocks) notifications by
`id` for performance reasons.

Notifications are deduplicated by `id`. If you add a notification with an `id`
that already exists in the queue, the call is ignored. This prevents duplicate
notifications from appearing.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ButtonSet,
    NotificationQueue,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let queue;
  let count = 0;
</script>

<NotificationQueue bind:this={queue} />

<ButtonSet>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      queue.add({
        id: "id",
        kind: "warning",
        title: "Duplicate notification",
        subtitle:
          "This notification has the same id. Click the button multiple times.",
      });
    }}
  >
    Add duplicate
  </Button>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      queue.add({
        id: `id-${count++}`,
        kind: "info",
        title: "Unique notification",
        subtitle: "This has a unique id, so it will always appear.",
      });
    }}
  >
    Add unique
  </Button>
</ButtonSet>
```

### Max notifications

By default, the queue displays a maximum of 3 notifications. When the limit is
exceeded, the oldest notification is automatically removed.

This limit can be customized using the `maxNotifications` prop.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button, NotificationQueue } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let queue;
  let count = 0;
</script>

<NotificationQueue bind:this={queue} maxNotifications={3} />

<Button
  on:click={() => {
    count++;
    queue.add({
      kind: "success",
      title: `Notification ${count}`,
    });
  }}
>
  Add notification
</Button>
```

### Remove and clear

Use `remove(id)` to programmatically remove a specific notification, or
`clear()` to remove all notifications at once.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ButtonSet,
    NotificationQueue,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let queue;
  let notificationIds = [];
</script>

<NotificationQueue bind:this={queue} />

<ButtonSet>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      const id = queue.add({
        kind: "info",
        title: "Removable notification",
        subtitle: "This notification can be removed programmatically.",
        timeout: 0,
      });
      notificationIds = [...notificationIds, id];
    }}
  >
    Add notification
  </Button>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      if (notificationIds.length > 0) {
        const id = notificationIds[notificationIds.length - 1];
        queue.remove(id);
        notificationIds = notificationIds.slice(0, -1);
      }
    }}
  >
    Remove last
  </Button>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      queue.clear();
      notificationIds = [];
    }}
  >
    Clear all
  </Button>
</ButtonSet>
```

### Custom offsets

Customize the queue position using `offsetTop`, `offsetBottom`, and
`offsetRight` props. This is useful for positioning notifications below headers
or adjusting spacing.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button, NotificationQueue } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let queue;
</script>

<NotificationQueue
  bind:this={queue}
  position="top-right"
  offsetTop="5rem"
  offsetRight="2rem"
/>

<Button
  on:click={() => {
    queue.add({
      kind: "success",
      title: "Custom offset",
    });
  }}
>
  Add notification
</Button>
```

### Persistent notifications

Create persistent notifications that do not auto-dismiss by omitting the
`timeout` prop and hiding the close button using `hideCloseButton`.

These notifications remain visible until they are programmatically removed.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ButtonSet,
    NotificationQueue,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let queue;
</script>

<NotificationQueue bind:this={queue} />

<ButtonSet>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      queue.add({
        kind: "warning",
        title: "Persistent notification",
        subtitle:
          "This notification has no close button and will not auto-dismiss.",
        hideCloseButton: true,
      });
    }}
  >
    Add persistent
  </Button>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      queue.add({
        kind: "info",
        title: "Auto-dismiss notification",
        subtitle:
          "This notification has no close button but will auto-dismiss after 3 seconds.",
        hideCloseButton: true,
        timeout: 3000,
      });
    }}
  >
    Add auto-dismiss
  </Button>
  <Button
    on:click={() => {
      queue.clear();
    }}
  >
    Clear all
  </Button>
</ButtonSet>
```

---

### Component API

#### `NotificationQueue` props

| Prop               | Type                                         | Description                                                                                                                                                                         | Default       |
| ------------------ | -------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- |
| `position`         | `"top-right" \| "bottom-right"`              | Specify the position of the notification queue.                                                                                                                                     | `"top-right"` |
| `offsetTop`        | `string`                                     | Specify the top offset (CSS value)                                                                                                                                                  | `"3rem"`      |
| `offsetBottom`     | `string`                                     | Specify the bottom offset (CSS value)                                                                                                                                               | `"1rem"`      |
| `offsetRight`      | `string`                                     | Specify the right offset (CSS value)                                                                                                                                                | `"1rem"`      |
| `zIndex`           | `number`                                     | Specify the z-index of the notification queue.<br />By default, this matches the z-index of modals.                                                                                 | `9000`        |
| `maxNotifications` | `number`                                     | Specify the maximum number of notifications to display.<br />When this limit is exceeded, the oldest notification is automatically removed.                                         | `3`           |
| `add`              | `(notification: NotificationData) => string` | Add a notification to the queue.<br />If a notification with the same id exists, the call is ignored.<br />Returns the notification id (either the provided id or a generated one). | _undefined_   |
| `remove`           | `(id: string) => boolean`                    | Remove a notification by id.<br />Returns true if the notification was found and removed, false otherwise.                                                                          | _undefined_   |
| `clear`            | `() => any`                                  | Clear all notifications.                                                                                                                                                            | _undefined_   |

#### `NotificationQueue` typedefs

```ts
type NotificationData = {
  /** Optional id for deduplication */
  id?: string;
  kind?:
    | "error"
    | "info"
    | "info-square"
    | "success"
    | "warning"
    | "warning-alt";
  title?: string;
  subtitle?: string;
  caption?: string;
  timeout?: number;
  lowContrast?: boolean;
  closeButtonDescription?: string;
  statusIconDescription?: string;
  hideCloseButton?: boolean;
};
```


## NumberInput

Number inputs provide a controlled input for numerical values. They support
validation, step values, and various states to ensure accurate data entry.

### Default

Create a basic number input with increment and decrement controls. The input
accepts numerical values and provides visual feedback.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput labelText="Clusters" value={0} />
```

### No value

Allow empty values by setting both `allowEmpty` to `true` and `value` to `null`.
The `allowEmpty` prop enables the empty state, while `value={null}` represents
no value.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ButtonSet,
    NumberInput,
    Stack,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let value = null;
</script>

<Stack gap={4}>
  <NumberInput
    labelText="Clusters"
    allowEmpty
    bind:value
    helperText="Value: {value}"
  />
  <ButtonSet>
    <Button kind="tertiary" size="small" on:click={() => (value = null)}>
      Set to null
    </Button>
    <Button kind="tertiary" size="small" on:click={() => (value = 0)}>
      Set to 0
    </Button>
  </ButtonSet>
</Stack>
```

### Helper text

Add descriptive text below the input using the `helperText` prop. This helps
users understand the expected input.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput
  labelText="Clusters"
  value={0}
  helperText="Clusters provisioned in your region"
/>
```

### Minimum and maximum values

Constrain input values using `min` and `max` props. The stepper buttons will not
increment or decrement beyond the specified range. If a user types an
out-of-range value directly, the input shows an invalid visual state rather than
silently clamping. Provide `invalidText` to display an error message.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput
  min={4}
  max={20}
  value={4}
  invalidText="Number must be between 4 and 20."
  helperText="Clusters provisioned in your region"
  labelText="Clusters (4 min, 20 max)"
/>
```

### Step value

Control the increment/decrement step size using the `step` prop. This example
uses a step of 0.1.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput
  value={1}
  helperText="Step of 0.1"
  step={0.1}
  labelText="Clusters"
/>
```

### Step start value

Configure a starting point for stepping when the input is empty or zero using
`stepStartValue`. When the user clicks increment or decrement, the value jumps
directly to `stepStartValue` instead of stepping from zero.

This is useful when zero is not within the `min`/`max` range, or when there is a
more sensible default (e.g., the current year when asking for a year). Combined
with `allowEmpty`, it ensures the user must interact with the input before
submitting a value.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput
  stepStartValue={2026}
  allowEmpty
  min={2026}
  max={2100}
  labelText="Year"
/>
```

### Preserve decimal input

Preserve decimal input formatting like "1.0", "2.00", or "3." by setting
`allowDecimal` to `true`. This uses `type="text"` with `inputmode="decimal"`
instead of `type="number"`, allowing trailing zeros and decimal points to be
preserved while typing. This is useful for financial data or precise decimal
entry.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ButtonSet,
    NumberInput,
    Stack,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let value = 1.5;
</script>

<Stack gap={4}>
  <NumberInput
    allowDecimal
    allowEmpty
    bind:value
    step={0.01}
    labelText="Amount"
  />

  <ButtonSet>
    <Button on:click={() => (value = null)}>Set to null</Button>
    <Button on:click={() => (value = 0)}>Set to 0</Button>
    <Button on:click={() => (value = 1.23)}>Set to 1.23</Button>
  </ButtonSet>

  <div>
    <strong>Value:</strong>
    {value}
  </div>
</Stack>
```

### Locale formatting

Format numbers according to a locale using the `locale` prop with a BCP 47
language tag. The display value is formatted on blur using `Intl.NumberFormat`.
When `locale` is set, the input uses `type="text"` with `inputmode="decimal"`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput locale="de-DE" value={1234.5} labelText="Amount (German)" />
```

### Locale with format options

Combine `locale` with `formatOptions` for additional formatting control like
decimal precision.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput
  locale="en-US"
  formatOptions={{ minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }}
  value={1234.5}
  labelText="Price"
/>
```

### Custom validation

Use the `validate` prop to provide custom validation logic. The function
receives the raw input string and optional locale. Return `false` to mark
invalid, `true` to force valid (overriding auto bounds checks), or `undefined`
to use built-in validation.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput
  validate={(raw) => {
    const num = Number(raw);
    return Number.isNaN(num) ? undefined : num % 2 === 0;
  }}
  invalidText="Must be an even number"
  labelText="Even number"
  value={0}
/>

## Blur event Use `on:blur` to listen for when the input loses focus. The event
detail includes the current parsed `value` and the original `FocusEvent`.

<NumberInput
  on:blur={(e) => {
    console.log(e.detail.value); // number | null
    console.log(e.detail.event); // FocusEvent
  }}
/>

## Stepper click event Use `on:click:stepper` to listen for stepper button
clicks. The event detail includes the updated `value` and the `direction`
(`"up"` or `"down"`). This event only fires on button clicks, not arrow key
presses.

<NumberInput
  on:click:stepper={(e) => {
    console.log(e.detail.value); // number
    console.log(e.detail.direction); // "up" | "down"
  }}
/>

## Stepper blur event Use `on:blur:stepper` to listen for when a stepper button
loses focus. The event detail includes the current `value`, the `direction`, and
the original `FocusEvent`.

<NumberInput
  on:blur:stepper={(e) => {
    console.log(e.detail.value); // number | null
    console.log(e.detail.direction); // "up" | "down"
    console.log(e.detail.event); // FocusEvent
  }}
/>

## Stepper events
```

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput, Stack } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let value = 0;
  let clickStepperEvents = [];
  let blurEvents = [];
  let blurStepperEvents = [];
</script>

<Stack gap={4}>
  <NumberInput
    bind:value
    labelText="Clusters"
    on:click:stepper={(e) => {
      clickStepperEvents = [
        ...clickStepperEvents,
        `value: ${e.detail.value}, direction: ${e.detail.direction}`,
      ];
    }}
    on:blur={(e) => {
      blurEvents = [...blurEvents, `value: ${e.detail.value}`];
    }}
    on:blur:stepper={(e) => {
      blurStepperEvents = [
        ...blurStepperEvents,
        `value: ${e.detail.value}, direction: ${e.detail.direction}`,
      ];
    }}
  />
  <Stack gap={4}>
    <Stack gap={2}>
      <strong>click:stepper events:</strong>
      <pre>{clickStepperEvents.join("\n") || "(none)"}</pre>
    </Stack>
    <Stack gap={2}>
      <strong>blur events:</strong>
      <pre>{blurEvents.join("\n") || "(none)"}</pre>
    </Stack>
    <Stack gap={2}>
      <strong>blur:stepper events:</strong>
      <pre>{blurStepperEvents.join("\n") || "(none)"}</pre>
    </Stack>
  </Stack>
</Stack>
```

### Hidden label

Hide the label visually while maintaining accessibility by setting `hideLabel`
to `true`. The label is still available to screen readers.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput hideLabel labelText="Clusters" value={0} />
```

### Extra-large size

Use the extra-large size for prominent inputs by setting `size` to `"xl"`. This
provides more visual emphasis.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput size="xl" labelText="Clusters" value={0} />
```

### Small size

Use the small size for compact layouts by setting `size` to `"sm"`. This is
ideal for secondary inputs.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput size="sm" labelText="Clusters" value={0} />
```

### Light variant

Use the light variant for dark backgrounds by setting `light` to `true`. This
provides better contrast in dark themes.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput light labelText="Clusters" value={0} />
```

### Invalid state

Indicate an invalid value by setting `invalid` to `true`. This example shows a
validation error.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput
  invalid
  invalidText="Invalid value"
  labelText="Clusters"
  value={0}
/>
```

### Warning state

Indicate a warning state by setting `warn` to `true`. This example shows a
warning about the input value.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput
  warn
  warnText="A high number may impact initial rollout"
  labelText="Clusters"
  value={25}
/>
```

### Disabled state

Disable the input by setting `disabled` to `true`. This prevents all user
interaction.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput disabled labelText="Clusters" value={0} />
```

### Read-only state

Make the input read-only by setting `readonly` to `true`. This allows viewing
but prevents editing.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput readonly labelText="Clusters" value={0} />
```

### Hidden steppers

Hide the increment/decrement controls by setting `hideSteppers` to `true`. This
provides a simpler input interface.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput hideSteppers labelText="Clusters" value={0} />
```

### Disable wheel

Prevent the scroll wheel from changing the input value by setting `disableWheel`
to `true`. This is useful in forms where accidental scroll changes are
undesirable.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInput disableWheel labelText="Clusters" value={0} />
```

### Skeleton

Show a loading state using the number input skeleton. This is useful while data
is being fetched.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInputSkeleton } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInputSkeleton />
```

### Skeleton without label

Show a loading state without a label by setting `hideLabel` to `true`. This
maintains layout consistency.

```svelte
<script>
  import { NumberInputSkeleton } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<NumberInputSkeleton hideLabel />
```

---

### Component API

#### `NumberInput` props

| Prop               | Type                                                                   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                          | Default                                                                  |
| ------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `value` (Reactive) | `null \| number`                                                       | Specify the input value.<br />Use `null` to denote "no value".                                                                                                                                       | `null`                                                                   |
| `ref` (Reactive)   | `null \| HTMLInputElement`                                             | Obtain a reference to the input HTML element                                                                                                                                                         | `null`                                                                   |
| `size`             | `"sm" \| "xl"`                                                         | Set the size of the input.                                                                                                                                                                           | _undefined_                                                              |
| `step`             | `number`                                                               | Specify the step increment                                                                                                                                                                           | `1`                                                                      |
| `max`              | `number`                                                               | Specify the maximum value.                                                                                                                                                                           | _undefined_                                                              |
| `min`              | `number`                                                               | Specify the minimum value.                                                                                                                                                                           | _undefined_                                                              |
| `stepStartValue`   | `number`                                                               | Provide the value stepping should begin at when the input is empty.                                                                                                                                  | _undefined_                                                              |
| `light`            | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` to enable the light variant                                                                                                                                                            | `false`                                                                  |
| `readonly`         | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` for the input to be read-only                                                                                                                                                          | `false`                                                                  |
| `allowEmpty`       | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` to allow for an empty value                                                                                                                                                            | `false`                                                                  |
| `allowDecimal`     | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` to preserve decimal input formatting.<br />When enabled, uses type="text" with inputmode="decimal" instead of type="number".                                                           | `false`                                                                  |
| `locale`           | `string`                                                               | Specify a BCP 47 locale for number formatting.<br />When set, forces type="text" with inputmode="decimal"<br />and formats the display value using Intl.NumberFormat.                                | _undefined_                                                              |
| `formatOptions`    | `Intl.NumberFormatOptions`                                             | Specify Intl.NumberFormat options when `locale` is set.                                                                                                                                              | _undefined_                                                              |
| `disabled`         | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` to disable the input                                                                                                                                                                   | `false`                                                                  |
| `hideSteppers`     | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` to hide the input stepper buttons                                                                                                                                                      | `false`                                                                  |
| `disableWheel`     | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` to prevent the scroll wheel from changing the input value                                                                                                                              | `false`                                                                  |
| `validate`         | `(value: string, locale: string \| undefined) => boolean \| undefined` | Custom validation function.<br />Receives the current raw input string and locale.<br />Return `true` to force valid, `false` to force invalid,<br />or `undefined` to defer to built-in validation. | _undefined_                                                              |
| `invalid`          | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` to indicate an invalid state                                                                                                                                                           | `false`                                                                  |
| `invalidText`      | `string`                                                               | Specify the invalid state text                                                                                                                                                                       | `""`                                                                     |
| `warn`             | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` to indicate a warning state                                                                                                                                                            | `false`                                                                  |
| `warnText`         | `string`                                                               | Specify the warning state text                                                                                                                                                                       | `""`                                                                     |
| `helperText`       | `string`                                                               | Specify the helper text                                                                                                                                                                              | `""`                                                                     |
| `labelText`        | `string`                                                               | Specify the label text                                                                                                                                                                               | `""`                                                                     |
| `hideLabel`        | `boolean`                                                              | Set to `true` to visually hide the label text                                                                                                                                                        | `false`                                                                  |
| `translateWithId`  | `(id: NumberInputTranslationId) => string`                             | Override the default translation ids.                                                                                                                                                                | _undefined_                                                              |
| `translationIds`   | `{ increment: "increment"; decrement: "decrement" }`                   | Default translation ids.                                                                                                                                                                             | `{<br />  increment: "increment",<br />  decrement: "decrement",<br />}` |
| `id`               | `string`                                                               | Set an id for the input element                                                                                                                                                                      | `ccs-${Math.random().toString(36)}`                                      |
| `name`             | `string`                                                               | Specify a name attribute for the input.                                                                                                                                                              | _undefined_                                                              |

#### `NumberInput` typedefs

```ts
type NumberInputTranslationId = "increment" | "decrement";
```

#### `NumberInput` slots

| Slot            | Detail                  |
| --------------- | ----------------------- |
| `labelChildren` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `NumberInput` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:focus`      |
| `on:keydown`    |
| `on:keyup`      |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |
| `on:paste`      |

#### `NumberInput` dispatched events

| Event              | Detail                                                                                               |
| ------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `on:blur`          | `{<br />  event: FocusEvent;<br />  value: null \| number;<br />}`                                   |
| `on:blur:stepper`  | `{<br />  event: FocusEvent;<br />  value: null \| number;<br />  direction: "up" \| "down";<br />}` |
| `on:change`        | `null \| number`                                                                                     |
| `on:click:stepper` | `{<br />  value: null \| number;<br />  direction: "up" \| "down";<br />}`                           |
| `on:input`         | `null \| number`                                                                                     |

#### `NumberInput` $$restProps

`NumberInput` spreads `$$restProps` to the `input` element.

#### `NumberInputSkeleton` props

| Prop        | Type      | Description                          | Default |
| ----------- | --------- | ------------------------------------ | ------- |
| `hideLabel` | `boolean` | Set to `true` to hide the label text | `false` |

#### `NumberInputSkeleton` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |

#### `NumberInputSkeleton` $$restProps

`NumberInputSkeleton` spreads `$$restProps` to the `div` element.


## OrderedList

Ordered lists provide a structured way to display numbered lists of items. They
support nested lists, native browser styles, and expressive typography for
enhanced visual hierarchy.

> [!TIP] Consider using the [RecursiveList](/components/RecursiveList#ordered)
> component for rendering tree structured data.

### Default

Create a basic ordered list by wrapping list item components within the ordered
list.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ListItem, OrderedList } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OrderedList>
  <ListItem>Ordered list item</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Ordered list item</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Ordered list item</ListItem>
</OrderedList>
```

### With links

Add interactive elements like link components within list items.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Link, ListItem, OrderedList } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OrderedList>
  <ListItem>
```
