```svelte
    <Link href="#">Ordered list item</Link>
  </ListItem>
  <ListItem>
    <Link href="#">Ordered list item</Link>
  </ListItem>
  <ListItem>
    <Link href="#">Ordered list item</Link>
  </ListItem>
</OrderedList>
```

### Nested

Set the `nested` prop to `true` to create hierarchical lists with proper
indentation and numbering.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ListItem, OrderedList } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OrderedList>
  <ListItem>
    Ordered list level 1
    <OrderedList nested>
      <ListItem>Ordered list level 2</ListItem>
      <ListItem>
        Ordered list level 3
        <OrderedList nested>
          <ListItem>Ordered list level 3</ListItem>
          <ListItem>Ordered list level 3</ListItem>
        </OrderedList>
      </ListItem>
    </OrderedList>
  </ListItem>
  <ListItem>Ordered list level 1</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Ordered list level 1</ListItem>
</OrderedList>
```

### Native list styles

Enable native browser list styles by setting the `native` prop to `true`. This
is useful for large lists where the list number may overlap with the list item
text.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ListItem, OrderedList } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OrderedList native>
  <ListItem>
    Ordered list level 1
    <OrderedList nested>
      <ListItem>Ordered list level 2</ListItem>
      <ListItem>
        Ordered list level 3
        <OrderedList nested>
          <ListItem>Ordered list level 3</ListItem>
          <ListItem>Ordered list level 3</ListItem>
        </OrderedList>
      </ListItem>
    </OrderedList>
  </ListItem>
  <ListItem>Ordered list level 1</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Ordered list level 1</ListItem>
</OrderedList>
```

### Expressive styles

Use Carbon's expressive typesetting by setting the `expressive` prop to `true`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Link, ListItem, OrderedList } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OrderedList expressive>
  <ListItem><Link size="lg" href="#">Ordered list item</Link></ListItem>
  <ListItem>Ordered list item</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Ordered list item</ListItem>
</OrderedList>
```

---

### Component API

#### `OrderedList` props

| Prop         | Type      | Description                                          | Default |
| ------------ | --------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| `nested`     | `boolean` | Set to `true` to use the nested variant              | `false` |
| `native`     | `boolean` | Set to `true` to use native list styles              | `false` |
| `expressive` | `boolean` | Set to `true` to use Carbon's expressive typesetting | `false` |

#### `OrderedList` slots

| Slot      | Detail                  |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `default` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `OrderedList` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |

#### `OrderedList` $$restProps

`OrderedList` spreads `$$restProps` to the `ol` element.

#### `ListItem` slots

| Slot      | Detail                  |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `default` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `ListItem` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |

#### `ListItem` $$restProps

`ListItem` spreads `$$restProps` to the `li` element.


## OverflowMenu

Overflow menus provide a compact way to display a list of actions or options.
They render as a button that opens a dropdown menu when clicked, making them
ideal for secondary actions or overflow content.

### Default

Create a basic overflow menu by wrapping overflow menu item components within
the overflow menu.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu>
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Manage credentials" />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Portal menu

Set `portalMenu` to `true` to render the menu in a floating portal. This
prevents the menu from being clipped by parent containers with
`overflow: hidden` or z-index stacking contexts. The example below shows a
container with hidden overflow. Without `portalMenu`, the menu would be clipped.

When inside a [Modal](/components/Modal), `portalMenu` defaults to `true` unless
explicitly set to `false`.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    OverflowMenu,
    OverflowMenuItem,
    Stack,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Stack
  gap={4}
  style="overflow: hidden; border: 1px dashed var(--cds-border-subtle); padding: 1rem; max-height: 120px;"
>
  <div>
    This container has hidden overflow. Without <code>portalMenu</code>, the
    menu would be clipped.
  </div>
  <OverflowMenu portalMenu>
    <OverflowMenuItem text="Edit" />
    <OverflowMenuItem text="Duplicate" />
    <OverflowMenuItem danger text="Delete" />
  </OverflowMenu>
</Stack>
```

### Flipped

Set `flipped` to `true` to position the menu to the left of the button.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu flipped>
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Manage credentials" />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Menu direction

Set `direction` to `"top"` to position the menu above the button.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu flipped direction="top">
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Manage credentials" />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Light variant

Enable the light variant by setting `light` to `true`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu light>
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Manage credentials" />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Extra-large size

Set `size` to `"xl"` for an extra-large overflow menu.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu size="xl">
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Manage credentials" />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Small size

Set `size` to `"sm"` for a small overflow menu.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu size="sm">
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Manage credentials" />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Custom primary focus

Set `primaryFocus` to `true` on a menu item to focus it when opening the
dropdown.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu>
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Manage credentials" />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem primaryFocus danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Custom trigger icon

Replace the default vertical overflow menu icon with a custom icon.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
  import Add from "carbon-icons-svelte/lib/Add.svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu icon={Add}>
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Manage credentials" />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Custom trigger slot

Use the `menu` slot to customize the trigger button content.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu style="width: auto;">
  <div slot="menu" style="padding: 1rem; color: red;">Custom trigger</div>
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Manage credentials" />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Disabled items

Set `disabled` to `true` to disable menu items. Use `hasDivider` to add visual
separation between items.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<OverflowMenu>
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Create key" />
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Import key" />
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Revoke key" disabled />
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Duplicate key" disabled />
  <OverflowMenuItem
    hasDivider
    href="https://cloud.ibm.com/docs/api-gateway/"
    target="_blank"
    text="API documentation"
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem hasDivider danger text="Delete service" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

### Prevent menu from closing

Use `preventDefault()` on individual overflow menu item click events to prevent
the menu from closing when that item is clicked. This is useful for scenarios
where you want to keep the menu open after performing an action.

```svelte
<script>
  import { OverflowMenu, OverflowMenuItem } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let copying = false;
  let copied = false;

  async function copyToClipboard() {
    if (copying) return;
    copying = true;
    copied = false;
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText("Sample text to copy");
    copied = true;
    setTimeout(() => {
      copied = false;
    }, 2000);

    copying = false;
  }
</script>

<OverflowMenu size="field">
  <OverflowMenuItem
    text={copied ? "Copied!" : "Copy page"}
    disabled={copying}
    on:click={(e) => {
      // Prevent menu from closing for this item.
      e.preventDefault();
      copyToClipboard();
    }}
  />
  <OverflowMenuItem text="Close menu" />
</OverflowMenu>
```

---

### Component API

#### `OverflowMenu` props

| Prop                   | Type                        | Description                                                                                                                                                                                 | Default                             |
| ---------------------- | --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `open` (Reactive)      | `boolean`                   | Set to `true` to open the menu                                                                                                                                                              | `false`                             |
| `icon` (Reactive)      | `Icon`                      | Specify the icon to render.                                                                                                                                                                 | `OverflowMenuVertical`              |
| `buttonRef` (Reactive) | `null \| HTMLButtonElement` | Obtain a reference to the trigger button element                                                                                                                                            | `null`                              |
| `menuRef` (Reactive)   | `null \| HTMLUListElement`  | Obtain a reference to the overflow menu element                                                                                                                                             | `null`                              |
| `size`                 | `"sm" \| "xl"`              | Specify the size of the overflow menu.                                                                                                                                                      | _undefined_                         |
| `direction`            | `"top" \| "bottom"`         | Specify the direction of the overflow menu relative to the button.                                                                                                                          | `"bottom"`                          |
| `light`                | `boolean`                   | Set to `true` to enable the light variant                                                                                                                                                   | `false`                             |
| `flipped`              | `boolean`                   | Set to `true` to flip the menu relative to the button                                                                                                                                       | `false`                             |
| `menuOptionsClass`     | `string`                    | Specify the menu options class.                                                                                                                                                             | _undefined_                         |
| `iconClass`            | `string`                    | Specify the icon class.                                                                                                                                                                     | _undefined_                         |
| `iconDescription`      | `string`                    | Specify the ARIA label for the icon                                                                                                                                                         | `"Open and close list of options"`  |
| `id`                   | `string`                    | Set an id for the button element                                                                                                                                                            | `ccs-${Math.random().toString(36)}` |
| `portalMenu`           | `boolean \| undefined`      | Set to `true` to render the menu in a portal,<br />allowing it to escape containers with `overflow: hidden`.<br />When inside a Modal, defaults to `true` unless explicitly set to `false`. | _undefined_                         |

#### `OverflowMenu` slots

| Slot      | Detail                  |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `default` | `Record<string, never>` |
| `menu`    | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `OverflowMenu` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:keydown`    |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |

#### `OverflowMenu` dispatched events

| Event      | Detail                                                  |
| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| `on:close` | `{<br />  index?: number;<br />  text?: string;<br />}` |

#### `OverflowMenu` $$restProps

`OverflowMenu` spreads `$$restProps` to the `button` element.

#### `OverflowMenuItem` props

| Prop                      | Type                                             | Description                                                                                                                                             | Default                             |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `primaryFocus` (Reactive) | `boolean`                                        | Set to `true` if the item should be focused when opening the menu                                                                                       | `false`                             |
| `ref` (Reactive)          | `null \| HTMLAnchorElement \| HTMLButtonElement` | Obtain a reference to the HTML element                                                                                                                  | `null`                              |
| `text`                    | `string`                                         | Specify the item text.<br />Alternatively, use the default slot.                                                                                        | `"Provide text"`                    |
| `href`                    | `string`                                         | Specify the `href` attribute if the item is a link                                                                                                      | `""`                                |
| `target`                  | `HTMLAnchorElement["target"]`                    | Specify the `target` attribute if the item is a link                                                                                                    | `""`                                |
| `rel`                     | `HTMLAnchorElement["rel"]`                       | Specify the `rel` attribute if the item is a link.<br />By default, `noopener noreferrer` is added if<br />`target="_blank"` unless `rel` is specified. | _undefined_                         |
| `disabled`                | `boolean`                                        | Set to `true` to disable the item                                                                                                                       | `false`                             |
| `hasDivider`              | `boolean`                                        | Set to `true` to include a divider                                                                                                                      | `false`                             |
| `danger`                  | `boolean`                                        | Set to `true` to use the danger variant                                                                                                                 | `false`                             |
| `requireTitle`            | `boolean`                                        | Set to `false` to omit the button `title` attribute                                                                                                     | `true`                              |
| `id`                      | `string`                                         | Set an id for the top-level element                                                                                                                     | `ccs-${Math.random().toString(36)}` |

#### `OverflowMenuItem` slots

| Slot      | Detail                  |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `default` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `OverflowMenuItem` forwarded events

| Event        |
| ------------ |
| `on:keydown` |

#### `OverflowMenuItem` dispatched events

| Event      | Detail       |
| ---------- | ------------ |
| `on:click` | `MouseEvent` |

#### `OverflowMenuItem` $$restProps

`OverflowMenuItem` spreads `$$restProps` to the `li` element.


## Pagination

Pagination provides navigation controls for large data sets. It displays the
current page, total items, and allows users to change page size and navigate
between pages.

### Default

Create a basic pagination component with default page size options.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Pagination } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Pagination totalItems={102} pageSizes={[10, 15, 20]} />
```

### Current page

Set the current page using the `page` prop.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Pagination } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Pagination totalItems={102} page={4} />
```

### Custom page sizes

Specify custom page sizes and set a default page size.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Pagination } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Pagination totalItems={102} pageSizes={[16, 36, 99]} pageSize={36} />
```

### Dynamic page sizes

Set `dynamicPageSizes` to `true` to automatically filter out redundant page
sizes based on `totalItems`. Page sizes larger than needed to display all items
on a single page are hidden.

For example, with a total of 9 items and page sizes of `[5, 10, 15]`, the page
sizes will be `[5, 10]`. This is because 10 is already larger than the total
number of items.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Pagination } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Pagination totalItems={9} pageSizes={[5, 10, 15]} dynamicPageSizes />
```

### Unknown pages

Set `pagesUnknown` to `true` when the total number of pages is unknown. This
renders the item range text without factoring in the total number of pages.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Pagination } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Pagination pagesUnknown />
```

### Page window

The number of native select items rendered is derived from `totalItems`. For
large datasets, this can impact performance. Use `pageWindow` to control the
number of rendered items.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Pagination } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Pagination totalItems={100_000} pageSizes={[10, 15, 20]} />
```

### Hidden page input

Disable the page input by setting `pageInputDisabled` to `true`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Pagination } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Pagination totalItems={102} pageInputDisabled />
```

### Hidden page size

Disable the page size selector by setting `pageSizeInputDisabled` to `true`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Pagination } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Pagination totalItems={102} pageSizeInputDisabled />
```

### Skeleton

Use the pagination skeleton to show a loading state.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PaginationSkeleton } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PaginationSkeleton />
```

---

### Component API

#### `Pagination` props

| Prop                    | Type                                                  | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Default                             |
| ----------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `page` (Reactive)       | `number`                                              | Specify the current page index                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | `1`                                 |
| `pageSize` (Reactive)   | `number`                                              | Specify the number of items to display in a page                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `10`                                |
| `totalItems`            | `number`                                              | Specify the total number of items                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | `0`                                 |
| `pageWindow`            | `number`                                              | If `totalItems` is a large number, it can affect the<br />rendering performance of this component since its value<br />is used to calculate the number of pages in the native<br />select dropdown. This value creates a small window of<br />pages rendered around the current page. By default,<br />a maximum of 1000 select items are rendered. | `1000`                              |
| `disabled`              | `boolean`                                             | Set to `true` to disable the pagination                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | `false`                             |
| `forwardText`           | `string`                                              | Specify the forward button text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `"Next page"`                       |
| `backwardText`          | `string`                                              | Specify the backward button text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | `"Previous page"`                   |
| `itemsPerPageText`      | `string`                                              | Specify the items per page text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `"Items per page:"`                 |
| `itemText`              | `(min: number, max: number) => string`                | Override the item text.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | _undefined_                         |
| `itemRangeText`         | `(min: number, max: number, total: number) => string` | Override the item range text.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | _undefined_                         |
| `pageInputDisabled`     | `boolean`                                             | Set to `true` to disable the page input                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | `false`                             |
| `pageSizeInputDisabled` | `boolean`                                             | Set to `true` to disable the page size input                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | `false`                             |
| `pageSizes`             | `ReadonlyArray<number>`                               | Specify the available page sizes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | `[10]`                              |
| `dynamicPageSizes`      | `boolean`                                             | Set to `true` to dynamically filter page sizes based on total items.<br />Page sizes larger than needed to display all items on a single page are hidden.                                                                                                                                                                                           | `false`                             |
| `pagesUnknown`          | `boolean`                                             | Set to `true` if the number of pages is unknown                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | `false`                             |
| `pageText`              | `(page: number) => string`                            | Override the page text.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | _undefined_                         |
| `pageRangeText`         | `(current: number, total: number) => string`          | Override the page range text.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | _undefined_                         |
| `id`                    | `string`                                              | Set an id for the top-level element                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | `ccs-${Math.random().toString(36)}` |

#### `Pagination` dispatched events

| Event                       | Detail                                                     | Description                                                                     |
| --------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `on:change`                 | `{<br />  page?: number;<br />  pageSize?: number;<br />}` | Dispatched when the user changes the page or page size through any interaction. |
| `on:click:button--next`     | `{<br />  page: number;<br />}`                            | Dispatched when the user clicks the next page button.                           |
| `on:click:button--previous` | `{<br />  page: number;<br />}`                            | Dispatched when the user clicks the previous page button.                       |
| `on:update`                 | `{<br />  pageSize: number;<br />  page: number;<br />}`   | Dispatched reactively whenever the page or page size changes.                   |

#### `Pagination` $$restProps

`Pagination` spreads `$$restProps` to the `div` element.

#### `PaginationSkeleton` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |

#### `PaginationSkeleton` $$restProps

`PaginationSkeleton` spreads `$$restProps` to the `div` element.


## PaginationNav

Pagination nav provides a compact navigation interface for paginated content. It
displays page numbers and navigation buttons, with support for overflow menus
when there are many pages.

### Default

Create a basic pagination navigation with default settings.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PaginationNav } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PaginationNav />
```

### Reactive example

Use the `page` prop to bind to the current page number.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button, PaginationNav, Stack } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let page = 2;
</script>

<Stack gap={6}>
  <PaginationNav bind:page />
  <Stack gap={4} orientation="horizontal" align="center">
    <Button
      kind="tertiary"
      size="small"
      on:click={() => (page = 1)}
      disabled={page === 0}
    >
      Set page to 1
    </Button>
    <div>
      <strong>Current page:</strong>
      {page}
    </div>
  </Stack>
</Stack>
```

### Total pages

Specify the total number of pages using the `total` prop.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PaginationNav } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PaginationNav total={3} />
```

### Loop navigation

Set `loop` to `true` to enable circular navigation between pages.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PaginationNav } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PaginationNav total={3} loop />
```

### Visible pages

Control the number of visible page numbers with the `shown` prop.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PaginationNav } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PaginationNav total={100} shown={5} />
```

### Custom button text

Customize the navigation button text using `forwardText` and `backwardText`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PaginationNav } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PaginationNav forwardText="Next" backwardText="Previous" />
```

### Tooltip position

Set the tooltip position relative to the navigation buttons using
`tooltipPosition`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PaginationNav } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PaginationNav tooltipPosition="outside" total={3} loop />
```

---

### Component API

#### `PaginationNav` props

| Prop              | Type                                                              | Description                                                         | Default           |
| ----------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------- |
| `page` (Reactive) | `number`                                                          | Specify the current page index                                      | `1`               |
| `total`           | `number`                                                          | Specify the total number of pages                                   | `10`              |
| `shown`           | `number`                                                          | Specify the total number of pages to show                           | `10`              |
| `loop`            | `boolean`                                                         | Set to `true` to loop the navigation                                | `false`           |
| `forwardText`     | `string`                                                          | Specify the forward button text                                     | `"Next page"`     |
| `backwardText`    | `string`                                                          | Specify the backward button text                                    | `"Previous page"` |
| `tooltipPosition` | `"top" \| "right" \| "bottom" \| "left" \| "outside" \| "inside"` | Set the position of the tooltip relative to the pagination buttons. | `"bottom"`        |

#### `PaginationNav` dispatched events

| Event                       | Detail                          | Description                        |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `on:change`                 | `{<br />  page: number;<br />}` | Fires after every user interaction |
| `on:click:button--next`     | `{<br />  page: number;<br />}` |                                    |
| `on:click:button--previous` | `{<br />  page: number;<br />}` |                                    |

#### `PaginationNav` $$restProps

`PaginationNav` spreads `$$restProps` to the `nav` element.


## PasswordInput

Password inputs provide a secure text input field with a visibility toggle for
password entry. They include features for validation, warnings, and
accessibility.

### Default

Create a basic password input with a label and placeholder.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput labelText="Password" placeholder="Enter password..." />
```

### Custom tooltip alignment

Customize the tooltip alignment and position of the visibility toggle through
the `tooltipAlignment` and `tooltipPosition` props.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput
  tooltipAlignment="start"
  tooltipPosition="left"
  labelText="Password"
  placeholder="Enter password..."
/>
```

### Password is visible

Set prop `type` to `"text"` to toggle password visibility.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput
  labelText="Password"
  type="text"
  placeholder="Enter password..."
  value="as_lta0890sdfpo__!9901"
/>
```

### Hidden label

Visually hide the label while maintaining accessibility.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput hideLabel labelText="Password" placeholder="Enter password..." />
```

### Light variant

Enable the light variant for use on dark backgrounds.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput light labelText="Password" placeholder="Enter password..." />
```

### Inline

Display the input with an inline label layout.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput inline labelText="Password" placeholder="Enter password..." />
```

### Extra-large size

Use the extra-large size variant for increased visibility.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput size="xl" labelText="Password" placeholder="Enter password..." />
```

### Small size

Use the small size variant for compact layouts.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput size="sm" labelText="Password" placeholder="Enter password..." />
```

### Invalid state

Display an error message when the input is invalid.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput
  invalid
  invalidText="Incorrect user name or password."
  labelText="Password"
  placeholder="Enter password..."
/>
```

### Warning state

Show a warning message for non-critical issues.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput
  warn
  warnText="Password has been reset."
  labelText="Password"
  placeholder="Enter password..."
/>
```

### Disabled state

Disable the input to prevent user interaction.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput disabled labelText="Password" placeholder="Enter password..." />
```

### Read-only state

Set the input to read-only to display a value that cannot be modified. The
visibility toggle still works to show or hide the password.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput
  readonly
  labelText="Password"
  placeholder="Enter password..."
  value="mySecretPassword123"
/>
```

### With helper text

Add helper text to provide additional context or instructions.

```svelte
<script>
  import { PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<PasswordInput
  helperText="Your password should be hard to guess"
  labelText="Password"
  placeholder="Enter password..."
/>
```

### Inside a modal

When used inside a `Modal`, the tooltip is automatically portalled to prevent it
from being clipped by `overflow: hidden`. Set `portalTooltip` to explicitly
control this behavior.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button, Modal, PasswordInput } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let open = false;
</script>

<Button on:click={() => (open = true)}>Open modal</Button>

<Modal
  bind:open
  modalHeading="Sign in"
  primaryButtonText="Submit"
  secondaryButtonText="Cancel"
  on:click:button--secondary={() => (open = false)}
>
  <PasswordInput labelText="Password" placeholder="Enter password..." />
</Modal>
```

---

### Component API

#### `PasswordInput` props

| Prop                | Type                                     | Description                                                                                                                                                                               | Default                             |
| ------------------- | ---------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `value` (Reactive)  | `number \| string`                       | Specify the input value.                                                                                                                                                                  | `""`                                |
| `type` (Reactive)   | `"text" \| "password"`                   | Set to `"text"` to toggle the password visibility.                                                                                                                                        | `"password"`                        |
| `ref` (Reactive)    | `null \| HTMLInputElement`               | Obtain a reference to the input HTML element                                                                                                                                              | `null`                              |
| `size`              | `"sm" \| "xl"`                           | Set the size of the input.                                                                                                                                                                | _undefined_                         |
| `placeholder`       | `string`                                 | Specify the placeholder text                                                                                                                                                              | `""`                                |
| `hidePasswordLabel` | `string`                                 | Specify the hide password label text                                                                                                                                                      | `"Hide password"`                   |
| `showPasswordLabel` | `string`                                 | Specify the show password label text                                                                                                                                                      | `"Show password"`                   |
| `tooltipAlignment`  | `"start" \| "center" \| "end"`           | Set the alignment of the tooltip relative to the icon.                                                                                                                                    | `"center"`                          |
| `tooltipPosition`   | `"top" \| "right" \| "bottom" \| "left"` | Set the position of the tooltip relative to the icon.                                                                                                                                     | `"bottom"`                          |
| `light`             | `boolean`                                | Set to `true` to enable the light variant                                                                                                                                                 | `false`                             |
| `disabled`          | `boolean`                                | Set to `true` to disable the input                                                                                                                                                        | `false`                             |
| `helperText`        | `string`                                 | Specify the helper text                                                                                                                                                                   | `""`                                |
| `labelText`         | `string`                                 | Specify the label text                                                                                                                                                                    | `""`                                |
| `hideLabel`         | `boolean`                                | Set to `true` to visually hide the label text                                                                                                                                             | `false`                             |
| `invalid`           | `boolean`                                | Set to `true` to indicate an invalid state                                                                                                                                                | `false`                             |
| `invalidText`       | `string`                                 | Specify the text for the invalid state                                                                                                                                                    | `""`                                |
| `warn`              | `boolean`                                | Set to `true` to indicate a warning state                                                                                                                                                 | `false`                             |
| `warnText`          | `string`                                 | Specify the warning state text                                                                                                                                                            | `""`                                |
| `inline`            | `boolean`                                | Set to `true` to use inline version                                                                                                                                                       | `false`                             |
| `id`                | `string`                                 | Set an id for the input element                                                                                                                                                           | `ccs-${Math.random().toString(36)}` |
| `name`              | `string`                                 | Specify a name attribute for the input.                                                                                                                                                   | _undefined_                         |
| `portalTooltip`     | `boolean \| undefined`                   | Set to `true` to render the tooltip in a portal,<br />preventing it from being clipped by `overflow: hidden` containers.<br />By default, the tooltip is portalled when inside a `Modal`. | _undefined_                         |

#### `PasswordInput` slots

| Slot            | Detail                  |
| --------------- | ----------------------- |
| `labelChildren` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `PasswordInput` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:blur`       |
| `on:change`     |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:focus`      |
| `on:input`      |
| `on:keydown`    |
| `on:keyup`      |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |
| `on:paste`      |

#### `PasswordInput` $$restProps

`PasswordInput` spreads `$$restProps` to the `input` element.


## Popover

Popovers provide a floating container that displays content relative to a
trigger element. They support various alignments, caret indicators, and visual
variants.

### Default

Create a basic popover with absolute positioning.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Popover } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<div>
  Parent
  <Popover open>Content</Popover>
</div>
```

### Relative position

Set `relative` to `true` to position the popover relative to its parent element.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Popover } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<div>
  Parent
  <Popover relative open>Content</Popover>
</div>
```

### Close on outside click

Enable automatic closing when clicking outside the popover using
`closeOnOutsideClick`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Popover } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<div>
  Parent
  <Popover
    open
    closeOnOutsideClick
    on:click:outside={() => {
      console.log("on:click:outside");
    }}
  >
    Content
  </Popover>
</div>
```

### Popover alignment

Customize the popover alignment using the `align` prop. Valid values include:
`"top" | "top-left" | "top-right" | "bottom" | "bottom-left" | "bottom-right" | "left" | "left-bottom" | "left-top" | "right" | "right-bottom" | "right-top"`.

The default `align` value is `"top"`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Popover, Stack } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Stack gap={10}>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="top-left">top-left</Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="top-right">top-right</Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="bottom">bottom</Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="bottom-left">bottom-left</Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="bottom-right">
      <div>bottom-right</div>
    </Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="left">left</Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="left-bottom">left-bottom</Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="left-right">left-right</Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="right">right</Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="right-bottom">right-bottom</Popover>
  </div>
  <div>
    Parent
    <Popover open align="right-top">right-top</Popover>
  </div>
</Stack>
```

### With caret

Add a caret indicator to the popover using the `caret` prop.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Popover } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<div>
  Parent
  <Popover caret open>Content</Popover>
</div>
```

### Custom caret alignment

By default, the caret is aligned "top". Possible `align` values include `"top"`,
`"top-left"`, `"top-right"`, `"bottom"`, `"bottom-left"`, `"bottom-right"`,
`"left"`, `"left-bottom"`, `"left-top"`, `"right"`, `"right-bottom"` or
`"right-top"`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Popover } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<div>
  Parent
  <Popover caret align="top-left" open>Content</Popover>
</div>
```

### Light variant

Enable the light variant for use on dark backgrounds.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Popover } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<div>
  Parent
  <Popover light open>Content</Popover>
</div>
```

### High contrast variant

Enable the high contrast variant for improved visibility.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Popover } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<div>
  Parent
  <Popover highContrast open>Content</Popover>
</div>
```

### External element

Use the `open` prop to manage state with an external element, like a button.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button, Popover } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let open = true;
  let ref = null;
</script>

<div bind:this={ref} style:position="relative">
  <Button on:click={() => (open = !open)}>Toggle popover</Button>
  <Popover
    bind:open
    align="bottom-left"
    on:click:outside={({ detail }) => {
      console.log("on:click:outside");
      open = ref.contains(detail.target);
    }}
  >
    Content
  </Popover>
</div>
```

---

### Component API

#### `Popover` props

| Prop                  | Type                                                                                                                                                                     | Description                                            | Default |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------ | ------- |
| `open` (Reactive)     | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                | Set to `true` to display the popover                   | `false` |
| `closeOnOutsideClick` | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                | Set to `true` to close the popover on an outside click | `false` |
| `caret`               | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                | Set to `true` render a caret                           | `false` |
| `align`               | `"top" \| "top-left" \| "top-right" \| "bottom" \| "bottom-left" \| "bottom-right" \| "left" \| "left-bottom" \| "left-top" \| "right" \| "right-bottom" \| "right-top"` | Specify the alignment of the caret.                    | `"top"` |
| `light`               | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                | Set to `true` to enable the light variant              | `false` |
| `highContrast`        | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                | Set to `true` to enable the high contrast variant      | `false` |
| `relative`            | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                | Set to `true` to use a relative position               | `false` |

#### `Popover` slots

| Slot      | Detail                  |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `default` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `Popover` dispatched events

| Event              | Detail                                 |
| ------------------ | -------------------------------------- |
| `on:click:outside` | `{<br />  target: HTMLElement;<br />}` |

#### `Popover` $$restProps

`Popover` spreads `$$restProps` to the `div` element.


## Portal

Portals render their content directly into `document.body`, allowing you to
escape parent overflow constraints and z-index stacking contexts.

For anchored, positioned content (e.g., dropdowns, popovers, overflow menus),
use [FloatingPortal](/components/FloatingPortal) instead.

### Default Portal

Render content in a portal. This is useful for modals, tooltips, and menus that
need to escape parent containers.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Portal } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<div>
  <div>This is rendered inside the div</div>
  <br />
  <Portal>This is rendered outside of the div</Portal>
</div>
```

### Multiple Portals

Each portal instance is independent and creates its own element in
`document.body`. Each portal is automatically cleaned up when it is removed.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button, ButtonSet, Portal } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let showPortal1 = false;
  let showPortal2 = false;
</script>

<ButtonSet>
  <Button on:click={() => (showPortal1 = !showPortal1)}>
    {showPortal1 ? "Unmount portal 1" : "Mount portal 1"}
  </Button>
  <Button on:click={() => (showPortal2 = !showPortal2)}>
    {showPortal2 ? "Unmount portal 2" : "Mount portal 2"}
  </Button>
</ButtonSet>

{#if showPortal1}
  <Portal>Portal content 1</Portal>
{/if}

{#if showPortal2}
  <Portal>Portal content 2</Portal>
{/if}
```

### Custom Tag

Use the `tag` prop to specify a custom HTML element. By default, the portal uses
a `div` element.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Portal } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<Portal tag="section">This portal uses a section tag.</Portal>
```

### Modal with Portal

Wrap the modal in a portal to escape parent containers with `overflow: hidden`
or z-index stacking contexts. This ensures the modal appears above all content
and isn't clipped by parent boundaries.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button, Modal, Portal, Stack } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let open = false;
</script>

<Stack gap={5} style="overflow: hidden; position: relative; height: 200px;">
  <p>
    This container hides overflowing content. Without a portal, the modal would
    be clipped.
  </p>
  <div><Button on:click={() => (open = true)}>Open modal</Button></div>
  <Portal>
    <Modal
      bind:open
      modalHeading="Modal in Portal"
      primaryButtonText="Confirm"
      secondaryButtonText="Cancel"
      on:click:button--secondary={() => (open = false)}
    >
      <p>
        This modal is rendered in a portal, escaping the parent container's
        overflow constraints and ensuring it appears above all other content.
      </p>
    </Modal>
  </Portal>
</Stack>
```

---

### Component API

#### `Portal` props

| Prop             | Type                          | Description                               | Default |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------- | ----------------------------------------- | ------- |
| `ref` (Reactive) | `null \| HTMLElement`         | Obtain a reference to the portal element. | `null`  |
| `tag`            | `keyof HTMLElementTagNameMap` | Specify the tag name.                     | `"div"` |

#### `Portal` slots

| Slot      | Detail                  |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `default` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `Portal` $$restProps

`Portal` spreads `$$restProps` to the `svelte:element` element.


## ProgressBar

Progress bars provide a visual indicator of progress for operations such as file
uploads or data processing. They support determinate and indeterminate states,
various sizes, and status indicators.

### Default

Create an indeterminate progress bar that continuously animates.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar helperText="Loading..." />
```

### Small size

Use the small size variant for compact layouts.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar size="sm" helperText="Loading..." />
```

### Percentage

Display progress as a percentage using the `value` prop.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar
  value={40}
  labelText="Upload status"
  helperText="40 MB of 100 MB"
/>
```

### Finished status

Show completion status with a checkmark icon.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar
  value={100}
  status="finished"
  labelText="Upload file"
  helperText="Upload complete"
/>
```

### Error status

Indicate errors with an error icon and red styling.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar
  value={0}
  status="error"
  labelText="Upload file"
  helperText="Invalid file format"
/>
```

### Custom max value

Set a custom maximum value for the progress bar.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar
  value={40}
  max={200}
  labelText="Upload status"
  helperText="40 MB of 200 MB"
/>
```

### Hidden label

Visually hide the label while maintaining accessibility.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar
  hideLabel
  value={40}
  labelText="Upload status"
  helperText="40 MB of 100 MB"
/>
```

### Inline variant

Use the inline variant to display progress without helper text.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar
  kind="inline"
  value={40}
  labelText="Upload status"
  helperText="40 MB of 100 MB"
/>
```

### Indented variant

Use the indented variant for a more compact layout.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar
  kind="indented"
  value={40}
  labelText="Upload status"
  helperText="40 MB of 100 MB"
/>
```

### Indented status variant

Combine the indented variant with status indicators.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressBar } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressBar
  kind="indented"
  status="finished"
  value={40}
  labelText="Upload file"
  helperText="Upload complete"
/>
```

### UX example

Demonstrate a complete upload flow with start and end states.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ButtonSet,
    ProgressBar,
    Stack,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let max = 328;
  let value = 0;
  let status = "active";

  $: helperText =
    value > 0 ? `${value.toFixed(0)}MB of ${max}MB` : "Press start";
  $: if (value === max) {
    helperText = "Done";
    status = "finished";
  }
</script>

<Stack gap={8}>
  <ProgressBar labelText="Upload status" {value} {max} {helperText} {status} />
  <ButtonSet>
    <Button
      disabled={value > 0}
      on:click={() => {
        const interval = setInterval(() => {
          const delta = Math.random() * 10;

          if (value + delta < max) {
            value += delta;
          } else {
            value = max;
            clearInterval(interval);
          }
        }, 30);
      }}
    >
      Start
    </Button>
    <Button
      kind="tertiary"
      disabled={value !== max}
      on:click={() => {
        value = 0;
        status = "active";
      }}
    >
      Reset
    </Button>
  </ButtonSet>
</Stack>
```

---

### Component API

#### `ProgressBar` props

| Prop         | Type                                  | Description                                   | Default                             |
| ------------ | ------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `value`      | `number`                              | Specify the current value.                    | _undefined_                         |
| `max`        | `number`                              | Specify the maximum value                     | `100`                               |
| `kind`       | `"default" \| "inline" \| "indented"` | Specify the kind of progress bar.             | `"default"`                         |
| `status`     | `"active" \| "finished" \| "error"`   | Specify the status.                           | `"active"`                          |
| `size`       | `"sm" \| "md"`                        | Specify the size.                             | `"md"`                              |
| `labelText`  | `string`                              | Specify the label text                        | `""`                                |
| `hideLabel`  | `boolean`                             | Set to `true` to visually hide the label text | `false`                             |
| `helperText` | `string`                              | Specify the helper text                       | `""`                                |
| `id`         | `string`                              | Set an id for the progress bar element        | `ccs-${Math.random().toString(36)}` |

#### `ProgressBar` slots

| Slot            | Detail                  |
| --------------- | ----------------------- |
| `labelChildren` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `ProgressBar` $$restProps

`ProgressBar` spreads `$$restProps` to the `div` element.


## ProgressIndicator

Progress indicators provide a visual representation of progress through a
sequence of steps. They support horizontal and vertical layouts, step completion
states, and interactive navigation.

### Default

Create a horizontal progress indicator with four steps.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressIndicator, ProgressStep } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressIndicator currentIndex={2}>
  <ProgressStep
    complete
    label="Step 1"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    complete
    label="Step 2"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    complete
    label="Step 3"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    label="Step 4"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
</ProgressIndicator>
```

### Prevent change on click

Disable automatic step selection when clicking completed steps.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressIndicator, ProgressStep } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressIndicator preventChangeOnClick currentIndex={2}>
  <ProgressStep
    complete
    label="Step 1"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    complete
    label="Step 2"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    complete
    label="Step 3"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    label="Step 4"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
</ProgressIndicator>
```

### Programmatic usage

Update the current step programmatically while maintaining step completion
rules.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ProgressIndicator,
    ProgressStep,
    Stack,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let currentIndex = 1;
  let thirdStepCurrent = false;
</script>

<Stack gap={6}>
  <ProgressIndicator bind:currentIndex>
    <ProgressStep
      complete
      label="Step 1"
      description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
    />
    <ProgressStep
      complete
      label="Step 2"
      description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
    />
    <ProgressStep
      complete
      bind:current={thirdStepCurrent}
      label="Step 3"
      description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
    />
    <ProgressStep
      label="Step 4"
      description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
    />
  </ProgressIndicator>
  <Stack gap={4}>
    <div>
      <Button
        kind={currentIndex === 2 ? "secondary" : "primary"}
        size="small"
        on:click={() => {
          currentIndex = currentIndex === 2 ? 0 : 2;
        }}
      >
        Set currentIndex to
        {currentIndex === 2 ? 0 : 2}
      </Button>
    </div>
    <div>
      <strong>Current index:</strong>
      {currentIndex}
    </div>
    <div>
      <strong>Is the third step currently selected?</strong>
      {thirdStepCurrent}
    </div>
  </Stack>
</Stack>
```

### Invalid step

Mark a step as invalid to indicate an error state.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressIndicator, ProgressStep } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressIndicator>
  <ProgressStep
    complete
    label="Step 1"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    invalid
    label="Step 2"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    label="Step 3"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
</ProgressIndicator>
```

### Disabled steps

Disable specific steps to prevent user interaction.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressIndicator, ProgressStep } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressIndicator>
  <ProgressStep
    complete
    label="Step 1"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    disabled
    label="Step 2"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    disabled
    label="Step 3"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
</ProgressIndicator>
```

### Spaced-equally

Distribute steps evenly across the available space.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressIndicator, ProgressStep } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressIndicator spaceEqually>
  <ProgressStep
    label="Really long label"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    label="Really long label"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    label="Really long label"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
</ProgressIndicator>
```

### Vertical

Display steps in a vertical layout.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressIndicator, ProgressStep } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressIndicator vertical>
  <ProgressStep
    label="Really long label"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    label="Really long label"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
  <ProgressStep
    label="Really long label"
    description="The progress indicator will listen for clicks on the steps"
  />
</ProgressIndicator>
```

### Skeleton

Show a loading state with the specified number of steps.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressIndicatorSkeleton } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressIndicatorSkeleton />
```

### Skeleton (vertical)

Show a vertical loading state with the specified number of steps.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ProgressIndicatorSkeleton } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<ProgressIndicatorSkeleton vertical />
```

---

### Component API

#### `ProgressIndicator` props

| Prop                      | Type      | Description                                                                                    | Default |
| ------------------------- | --------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| `currentIndex` (Reactive) | `number`  | Specify the current step index                                                                 | `0`     |
| `vertical`                | `boolean` | Set to `true` to use the vertical variant                                                      | `false` |
| `spaceEqually`            | `boolean` | Set to `true` to specify whether the progress steps should be split equally in size in the div | `false` |
| `preventChangeOnClick`    | `boolean` | Set to `true` to prevent `currentIndex` from updating                                          | `false` |

#### `ProgressIndicator` slots

| Slot      | Detail                  |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `default` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `ProgressIndicator` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |

#### `ProgressIndicator` dispatched events

| Event       | Detail   |
| ----------- | -------- |
| `on:change` | `number` |

#### `ProgressIndicator` $$restProps

`ProgressIndicator` spreads `$$restProps` to the `ul` element.

#### `ProgressStep` props

| Prop                 | Type      | Description                                | Default                             |
| -------------------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------- |
| `current` (Reactive) | `boolean` | Set to `true` to use the current variant   | `false`                             |
| `complete`           | `boolean` | Set to `true` for the complete variant     | `false`                             |
| `disabled`           | `boolean` | Set to `true` to disable the progress step | `false`                             |
| `invalid`            | `boolean` | Set to `true` to indicate an invalid state | `false`                             |
| `description`        | `string`  | Specify the step description               | `""`                                |
| `label`              | `string`  | Specify the step label                     | `""`                                |
| `secondaryLabel`     | `string`  | Specify the step secondary label           | `""`                                |
| `id`                 | `string`  | Set an id for the top-level element        | `ccs-${Math.random().toString(36)}` |

#### `ProgressStep` slots

| Slot      | Detail                                                                     |
| --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `default` | `{<br />  props: {<br />    class: "bx--progress-label";<br />  };<br />}` |

#### `ProgressStep` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:keydown`    |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |

#### `ProgressStep` $$restProps

`ProgressStep` spreads `$$restProps` to the `li` element.

#### `ProgressIndicatorSkeleton` props

| Prop       | Type      | Description                               | Default |
| ---------- | --------- | ----------------------------------------- | ------- |
| `vertical` | `boolean` | Set to `true` to use the vertical variant | `false` |
| `count`    | `number`  | Specify the number of steps to render     | `4`     |

#### `ProgressIndicatorSkeleton` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |

#### `ProgressIndicatorSkeleton` $$restProps

`ProgressIndicatorSkeleton` spreads `$$restProps` to the `ul` element.


## RadioButton

Radio buttons provide a selection control that allows users to choose a single
option from a set. They support both individual and grouped usage, with options
for horizontal and vertical layouts.

### Default

Create a group of radio buttons with a shared name and legend.

See [Standalone usage](#standalone-usage) for individual usage or
[Implicit grouping](#implicit-grouping) to group multiple standalone radio
buttons by name without using a radio button group.

```svelte
<script>
  import { RadioButton, RadioButtonGroup } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<RadioButtonGroup
  legendText="Storage tier (disk)"
  name="plan"
  selected="standard"
>
  <RadioButton labelText="Free (1 GB)" value="free" />
  <RadioButton labelText="Standard (10 GB)" value="standard" />
  <RadioButton labelText="Pro (128 GB)" value="pro" />
</RadioButtonGroup>
```

### Standalone usage

Use a radio button individually with a bindable `checked` prop for simple use
cases.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button, RadioButton, Stack } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let agreedToTerms = false;
</script>

<Stack gap={6}>
  <Stack align="start">
    <RadioButton
      bind:checked={agreedToTerms}
      labelText="I agree to the terms and conditions"
      name="terms"
      value="agreed"
    />
  </Stack>
  <div>
    <Button
      size="small"
      kind="secondary"
      disabled={!agreedToTerms}
      on:click={() => (agreedToTerms = !agreedToTerms)}
    >
      Reset
    </Button>
  </div>
</Stack>
```

### Implicit grouping

Multiple standalone radio button components sharing the same `name` attribute
automatically form a group and synchronize their checked state. This allows you
to create radio button groups without using a radio button group.

```svelte
<script>
  import { RadioButton, Stack } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  const options = [
    { value: "option1", label: "Option 1" },
    { value: "option2", label: "Option 2" },
    { value: "option3", label: "Option 3" },
  ];

  let checked = options.map(() => false);

  $: selected = options.find((_, i) => checked[i]);
</script>

<Stack gap={3}>
  <Stack orientation="horizontal">
    {#each options as option, i}
      <RadioButton
        bind:checked={checked[i]}
        value={option.value}
        labelText={option.label}
        name="implicit-group"
      />
    {/each}
  </Stack>

  <span>
    Selected:
    <strong>{selected?.label ?? "None"}</strong>
  </span>
</Stack>
```

### Hidden legend

Visually hide the legend while maintaining accessibility.

```svelte
<script>
  import { RadioButton, RadioButtonGroup } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<RadioButtonGroup
  hideLegend
  legendText="Storage tier (disk)"
  name="plan-legend"
  selected="standard"
>
  <RadioButton labelText="Free (1 GB)" value="free" />
  <RadioButton labelText="Standard (10 GB)" value="standard" />
  <RadioButton labelText="Pro (128 GB)" value="pro" />
</RadioButtonGroup>
```

### Custom label content

Use the `labelChildren` slot to provide custom label content instead of using
the `labelText` prop.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    RadioButton,
    RadioButtonGroup,
    Stack,
    Tooltip,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<RadioButtonGroup name="plan-legend-slot" selected="standard">
  <Stack slot="legendChildren" orientation="horizontal">
    Storage tier (disk)
    <Tooltip>
      <p>Storage tiers may vary based on geolocation.</p>
    </Tooltip>
  </Stack>
  <RadioButton labelText="Free (1 GB)" value="free" />
  <RadioButton labelText="Standard (10 GB)" value="standard" />
  <RadioButton labelText="Pro (128 GB)" value="pro" />
</RadioButtonGroup>
```

### Reactive example

Bind and update the selected value programmatically.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    RadioButton,
    RadioButtonGroup,
    Stack,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  const plans = ["Free (1 GB)", "Standard (10 GB)", "Pro (128 GB)"];

  let plan = plans[1];
</script>
```
