### Header with persisted hamburger menu

Create a header with a persistent hamburger menu state.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Column,
    Content,
    Grid,
    Header,
    HeaderNav,
    HeaderNavItem,
    HeaderNavMenu,
    Row,
    SideNav,
    SideNavItems,
    SideNavLink,
    SideNavMenu,
    SideNavMenuItem,
    SkipToContent,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let isSideNavOpen = false;
</script>

<Header
  persistentHamburgerMenu={true}
  companyName="IBM"
  platformName="Carbon Svelte"
  bind:isSideNavOpen
>
  <svelte:fragment slot="skipToContent"><SkipToContent /></svelte:fragment>
  <HeaderNav>
    <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 1" />
    <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 2" />
    <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 3" />
    <HeaderNavMenu text="Menu">
      <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 1" />
      <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 2" />
      <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 3" />
    </HeaderNavMenu>
  </HeaderNav>
</Header>

<SideNav bind:isOpen={isSideNavOpen}>
  <SideNavItems>
    <SideNavLink text="Link 1" />
    <SideNavLink text="Link 2" />
    <SideNavLink text="Link 3" />
    <SideNavMenu text="Menu">
      <SideNavMenuItem href="/" text="Link 1" />
      <SideNavMenuItem href="/" text="Link 2" />
      <SideNavMenuItem href="/" text="Link 3" />
    </SideNavMenu>
  </SideNavItems>
</SideNav>

<Content>
  <Grid>
    <Row>
      <Column><h1>Welcome</h1></Column>
    </Row>
  </Grid>
</Content>
```

### Header with toast notification

Integrate toasts with the UI Shell. This example triggers a toast, which appears
in the top right corner, below the header.

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Button,
    ButtonSet,
    Column,
    Content,
    Grid,
    Header,
    NotificationQueue,
    Row,
    SkipToContent,
    Stack,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let queue;
  let queuePosition = "top-right";

  const triggerToast = (position) => {
    queuePosition = position;
    queue.add({
      kind: "success",
      title: "Success",
      subtitle: "Your action was completed successfully.",
      timeout: 5000,
    });
  };
</script>

<Header companyName="IBM" platformName="Carbon Svelte">
  <svelte:fragment slot="skipToContent"><SkipToContent /></svelte:fragment>
</Header>

<NotificationQueue bind:this={queue} position={queuePosition} />

<Content>
  <Grid>
    <Row>
      <Column>
        <Stack gap={6}>
          <h1>Welcome</h1>
          <p>
            Click the buttons below to trigger toast notifications in different
            positions.
          </p>
          <ButtonSet>
            <Button on:click={() => triggerToast("top-right")}>
              Top right
            </Button>
            <Button on:click={() => triggerToast("bottom-right")}>
              Bottom right
            </Button>
          </ButtonSet>
        </Stack>
      </Column>
    </Row>
  </Grid>
</Content>
```

### Classic theme

Before version 0.105.0, the UI Shell defaulted to a mixed theme: **Gray 100**
header and **White** side navigation. Now, the UI Shell respects the current
theme (e.g., `white`, `g10`, `g80`, `g90`, `g100`).

Set `theme="classic"` on both `Header` and `SideNav` for the classic look:
**Gray 100** header and **White** side navigation, independent of the global
theme.

> [!NOTE] The classic theme requires **carbon-components-svelte/css/all.css**
> because it uses CSS custom properties.

```css
import "carbon-components-svelte/css/all.css";
```

```svelte
<script>
  import {
    Column,
    Content,
    Grid,
    Header,
    HeaderNav,
    HeaderNavItem,
    HeaderNavMenu,
    Row,
    SideNav,
    SideNavDivider,
    SideNavItems,
    SideNavLink,
    SideNavMenu,
    SideNavMenuItem,
    SkipToContent,
  } from "carbon-components-svelte";

  let isSideNavOpen = false;
</script>

<Header
  companyName="IBM"
  platformName="Carbon Svelte"
  theme="classic"
  bind:isSideNavOpen
>
  <svelte:fragment slot="skipToContent"><SkipToContent /></svelte:fragment>
  <HeaderNav>
    <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 1" />
    <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 2" />
    <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 3" />
    <HeaderNavMenu text="Menu">
      <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 1" />
      <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 2" />
      <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 3" />
    </HeaderNavMenu>
    <HeaderNavItem href="/" text="Link 4" />
  </HeaderNav>
</Header>

<SideNav theme="classic" bind:isOpen={isSideNavOpen}>
  <SideNavItems>
    <SideNavLink text="Link 1" />
    <SideNavLink text="Link 2" />
    <SideNavLink text="Link 3" />
    <SideNavMenu text="Menu">
      <SideNavMenuItem href="/" text="Link 1" />
      <SideNavMenuItem href="/" text="Link 2" />
      <SideNavMenuItem href="/" text="Link 3" />
    </SideNavMenu>
    <SideNavDivider />
    <SideNavLink text="Link 4" />
  </SideNavItems>
</SideNav>

<Content>
  <Grid>
    <Row>
      <Column><h1>Welcome</h1></Column>
    </Row>
  </Grid>
</Content>
```

---

### Component API

#### `Header` props

| Prop                       | Type                        | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Default     |
| -------------------------- | --------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `isSideNavOpen` (Reactive) | `boolean`                   | Set to `true` to open the side nav                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | `false`     |
| `ref` (Reactive)           | `null \| HTMLAnchorElement` | Obtain a reference to the HTML anchor element                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | `null`      |
| `expandedByDefault`        | `boolean`                   | Set to `false` to hide the side nav by default                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | `true`      |
| `uiShellAriaLabel`         | `string`                    | Specify the ARIA label for the header.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | _undefined_ |
| `href`                     | `string`                    | Specify the `href` attribute.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | _undefined_ |
| `companyName`              | `string`                    | Specify the company name.<br /><br />Alternatively, use the named slot "company".                                                                                                                                                                                            | _undefined_ |
| `platformName`             | `string`                    | Specify the platform name.<br />Alternatively, use the named slot "platform".                                                                                                                                                                                                | `""`        |
| `persistentHamburgerMenu`  | `boolean`                   | Set to `true` to persist the hamburger menu                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | `false`     |
| `expansionBreakpoint`      | `number`                    | The window width (px) at which the SideNav is expanded and the hamburger menu is hidden.<br />1056 represents the "large" breakpoint in pixels from the Carbon Design System:<br />- small: 320<br />- medium: 672<br />- large: 1056<br />- x-large: 1312<br />- max: 1584. | `1056`      |
| `iconMenu`                 | `Icon`                      | Specify the icon to render for the closed state.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | `Menu`      |
| `iconClose`                | `Icon`                      | Specify the icon to render for the opened state.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | `Close`     |
| `ariaLabelMenu`            | `string`                    | Specify the ARIA label for the hamburger menu.<br />Defaults to "Open menu" or "Close menu" based on `isSideNavOpen` state.                                                                                                                                                  | _undefined_ |
| `theme`                    | `"classic" \| undefined`    | Set to `"classic"` for the mixed UI Shell theme (Gray 100 header).<br />Use with `SideNav` `theme="classic"` (White side nav).<br />Requires `carbon-components-svelte/css/all.css`.                                                                                         | _undefined_ |

#### `Header` slots

| Slot            | Detail                  |
| --------------- | ----------------------- |
| `default`       | `Record<string, never>` |
| `company`       | `Record<string, never>` |
| `platform`      | `Record<string, never>` |
| `skipToContent` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `Header` forwarded events

| Event      |
| ---------- |
| `on:click` |

#### `Header` $$restProps

`Header` spreads `$$restProps` to the `a` element.

#### `HeaderAction` props

| Prop                         | Type                                               | Description                                                                                                                       | Default             |
| ---------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------- |
| `isOpen` (Reactive)          | `boolean`                                          | Set to `true` to open the panel                                                                                                   | `false`             |
| `ref` (Reactive)             | `null \| HTMLButtonElement`                        | Obtain a reference to the button HTML element                                                                                     | `null`              |
| `icon`                       | `Icon`                                             | Specify the icon to render when the action panel is closed.                                                                       | `Switcher`          |
| `closeIcon`                  | `Icon`                                             | Specify the icon to render when the action panel is open.                                                                         | `Close`             |
| `text`                       | `string`                                           | Specify the text displayed next to the icon.<br />Alternatively, use the named slot "textChildren".                               | _undefined_         |
| `iconDescription`            | `string`                                           | Specify an icon tooltip. The tooltip will not be displayed<br />if either the `text` prop or a named slot="textChildren" is used. | _undefined_         |
| `tooltipAlignment`           | `"start" \| "center" \| "end"`                     | Set the alignment of the tooltip relative to the icon.<br />Only applies when `iconDescription` is provided.                      | `"center"`          |
| `transition`                 | `false \| import("svelte/transition").SlideParams` | Customize the panel transition (i.e., `transition:slide`).<br />Set to `false` to disable the transition.                         | `{ duration: 200 }` |
| `preventCloseOnClickOutside` | `boolean`                                          | Set to `true` to prevent the panel from closing when clicking outside                                                             | `false`             |

#### `HeaderAction` slots

| Slot           | Detail                  |
| -------------- | ----------------------- |
| `default`      | `Record<string, never>` |
| `closeIcon`    | `Record<string, never>` |
| `icon`         | `Record<string, never>` |
| `textChildren` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `HeaderAction` forwarded events

| Event      |
| ---------- |
| `on:click` |

#### `HeaderAction` dispatched events

| Event      | Detail |
| ---------- | ------ |
| `on:close` | `null` |
| `on:open`  | `null` |

#### `HeaderAction` $$restProps

`HeaderAction` spreads `$$restProps` to the `button` element.

#### `HeaderActionLink` props

| Prop             | Type                        | Description                                   | Default     |
| ---------------- | --------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `ref` (Reactive) | `null \| HTMLAnchorElement` | Obtain a reference to the HTML anchor element | `null`      |
| `linkIsActive`   | `boolean`                   | Set to `true` to use the active state         | `false`     |
| `href`           | `string`                    | Specify the `href` attribute.                 | _undefined_ |
| `icon`           | `Icon`                      | Specify the icon to render.                   | _undefined_ |

#### `HeaderActionLink` slots

| Slot   | Detail                  |
| ------ | ----------------------- |
| `icon` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `HeaderActionLink` forwarded events

| Event      |
| ---------- |
| `on:click` |

#### `HeaderActionLink` $$restProps

`HeaderActionLink` spreads `$$restProps` to the `a` element.

#### `HeaderSearch` props

| Prop                             | Type                       | Description                                        | Default |
| -------------------------------- | -------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| `value` (Reactive)               | `string`                   | Specify the search input value                     | `""`    |
| `active` (Reactive)              | `boolean`                  | Set to `true` to activate and focus the search bar | `false` |
| `ref` (Reactive)                 | `null \| HTMLInputElement` | Obtain a reference to the input HTML element       | `null`  |
| `selectedResultIndex` (Reactive) | `number`                   | Specify the selected result index.                 | `0`     |
| `results`                        | `ReadonlyArray<Result>`    | Render a list of search results.                   | `[]`    |

#### `HeaderSearch` typedefs

```ts
type HeaderSearchResult = {
  href: string;
  text: string;
  description?: string;
};
```

#### `HeaderSearch` slots

| Slot      | Detail                                                  |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| `default` | `{<br />  result: Result;<br />  index: number;<br />}` |

| Event        |
| ------------ |
| `on:blur`    |
| `on:change`  |
| `on:focus`   |
| `on:input`   |
| `on:keydown` |
| `on:paste`   |

| Event         | Detail                                                                                              |
| ------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `on:active`   | `null`                                                                                              |
| `on:clear`    | `null`                                                                                              |
| `on:inactive` | `null`                                                                                              |
| `on:select`   | `{<br />  value: string;<br />  selectedResultIndex: number;<br />  selectedResult: Result;<br />}` |

## UnorderedList

Unordered lists provide a styled unordered list that supports nested lists,
links, and expressive typography. They are ideal for displaying bulleted content
in your interface.

> [!TIP] Consider using the [RecursiveList](/components/RecursiveList#unordered)
> component for rendering tree structured data.

### Default

Create a basic unordered list with list item components.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ListItem, UnorderedList } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<UnorderedList>
  <ListItem>Unordered list item</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Unordered list item</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Unordered list item</ListItem>
</UnorderedList>
```

### With links

Add links to list items by wrapping them in link components.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Link, ListItem, UnorderedList } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<UnorderedList>
  <ListItem>
    <Link href="#">Unordered list item</Link>
  </ListItem>
  <ListItem>
    <Link href="#">Unordered list item</Link>
  </ListItem>
  <ListItem>
    <Link href="#">Unordered list item</Link>
  </ListItem>
</UnorderedList>
```

### Nested

Create nested lists by setting `nested` to `true` on child unordered list
components.

```svelte
<script>
  import { ListItem, UnorderedList } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<UnorderedList>
  <ListItem>
    Unordered list level 1
    <UnorderedList nested>
      <ListItem>Unordered list level 2</ListItem>
      <ListItem>
        Unordered list level 3
        <UnorderedList nested>
          <ListItem>Unordered list level 3</ListItem>
          <ListItem>Unordered list level 3</ListItem>
        </UnorderedList>
      </ListItem>
    </UnorderedList>
  </ListItem>
  <ListItem>Unordered list level 1</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Unordered list level 1</ListItem>
</UnorderedList>
```

### Expressive styles

Use Carbon's expressive typesetting by setting `expressive` to `true`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { Link, ListItem, UnorderedList } from "carbon-components-svelte";
</script>

<UnorderedList expressive>
  <ListItem><Link size="lg" href="#">Unordered list item</Link></ListItem>
  <ListItem>Unordered list item</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Unordered list item</ListItem>
</UnorderedList>
```

---

### Component API

#### `UnorderedList` props

| Prop         | Type      | Description                                          | Default |
| ------------ | --------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| `nested`     | `boolean` | Set to `true` to use the nested variant              | `false` |
| `expressive` | `boolean` | Set to `true` to use Carbon's expressive typesetting | `false` |

#### `UnorderedList` slots

| Slot      | Detail                  |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `default` | `Record<string, never>` |

#### `UnorderedList` forwarded events

| Event           |
| --------------- |
| `on:click`      |
| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |

#### `UnorderedList` $$restProps

`UnorderedList` spreads `$$restProps` to the `ul` element.

#### `ListItem` slots

| Slot      | Detail                  |
| --------- | ----------------------- |
| `default` | `Record<string, never>` |

| Event           |
| --------------- |

| `on:mouseenter` |
| `on:mouseleave` |
| `on:mouseover`  |
